text: Here, in this corridor and exhibition space, I am struck by the strange blend of sterility and creativity. The first scene feels clinical and empty, yet the second bursts with color, ideas, and the promise of innovation. I experience a quiet anticipation as if on the threshold of discovery, aware that knowledge here is both curated and experimental. There is a sense of invitation to engage, but also a reminder of the structured boundaries within which this engagement occurs. I feel curious and contemplative.
